title: Easter Egg Hot Chocolate
summary: Got any leftover Easter eggs kicking about? We know that’s not likely but if you do, we’ve got a mega Easter egg hot chocolate recipe for you right here.

method.description: Lightly whip 60% of your double cream until you have very soft peaks and set aside in a cool place.
Roughly chop up your chocolate eggs.

Place the milk, icing sugar and remaining double cream in a sauce pan and gently warm over a medium heat. Add in the chocolate and reduce to a low heat. Stir for a couple of minutes until the chocolate has all melted and emulsified to create your hot chocolate. It should be a similar consistency to double cream and glossy.
Pour the hot chocolate into mugs and top each with a spoon of the whipped cream.

chefs.name: Ayala Daly
chefs.summary: Ayala Daly is Mob's content producer and resident vibe bringer. You’ve probably seen her all over the stories but she’s no stranger to the kitchen. Ayala blends her background as a food researcher with her passion for cooking. With a knack for experimentation, she crafts easy-to-follow recipes bursting with bold flavours, drawing inspiration from regular trips to her favourite farms and the thrill of all things spicy.
